REAndroid/APKEditor.Changelog:
## What's Changed
* Using ARSCLib-1.3.5
* Version logging by @Kirlif in https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/pull/108
* Use DEFAULT compression level : https://github.com/REAndroid/ARSCLib/commit/dfc558d6bf76c20c84c82fc3ba404a95b1afe7c6
* Fix: resource config flag qualifiers encoding : https://github.com/REAndroid/ARSCLib/commit/85c171884d467a9086527ee4ceb5bdac3a11caea
* Fix: Clean `requiredSplitTypes` & `splitTypes` from manifest with resource id #114
* Fix: Support compile/decompile apks to xml without resource table (e.g. split bundles) : https://github.com/REAndroid/ARSCLib/commit/4fa8e676d8a16307c006565ec9e79538e70b519c
* Update internal framework version to API-35
* Detect and warn incompatible bundle apks during merging : https://github.com/REAndroid/ARSCLib/commit/22a581663b28a9050eb2163e70137758fee58f89


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/compare/V1.3.8...V1.3.9
